message.content:
PreOne  
Operating System for Modern Preschools  

TEACHER COMPLETE JOURNEY MAP  
Simplify Teaching. Save Time. Track Every Child’s Growth.  

TEACHER PROMISE  
- Less Manual Work  
- More Time for Children  
- AI Assistance at Every Step  
- Stronger Parent Connection  


### 1. START OF DAY  
Plan your day and prepare your class  

1. Login & Dashboard  
   - Quick overview of today  
   - Classes & schedules  
   - Pending tasks  

2. Attendance  
   - One tap attendance  
   - Manual / QR / RFID  
   - Instantly synced  

3. Activity Planner  
   - Plan activities in seconds  
   - Age-wise suggestions  
   - Learning objectives ready  

4. Capture & Upload  
   - Capture photos / videos  
   - Add notes & tags  
   - Auto sync to parents  

5. Observation & Notes  
   - Quick observations  
   - Track skills & behavior  
   - Build child profile  

6. AI Report Generator  
   - AI creates smart reports  
   - Saves 70% of time  
   - Personalized insights  

7. Parent Communication  
   - Share updates instantly  
   - Photos, videos & notes  
   - Two-way chat  

8. Announcements  
   - School announcements  
   - Events & reminders  
   - Targeted audience  

Daily for Tomorrow  
   - Auto daily summary  
   - Plan next day easily  
   - All tasks in one place  
   - Activity suggestions  
   - Share with one click  
   - Be always prepared  


### DURING CLASS  
Engage children and capture every moment  


### CHILD TRACKING  
Track progress and development  


### COMMUNICATION  
Connect with parents and share updates  


### END OF DAY  
Finish reports and plan tomorrow better  


### AI TEACHER ASSISTANT – YOUR SMART COACH  
- Activity Ideas: Get age-appropriate activity suggestions  
- Behavior Tips: Handle classroom situations better  
- Report Writer: Create professional reports in seconds  
- Parent Reply Helper: Smart replies for parent messages  


### STUDENT PROGRESS OVERVIEW  
Aarav Sharma  
Playgroup A  

Skill Progress  
- Communication: 85%  
- Creativity: 92%  
- Social Skills: 78%  
- Fine Motor: 80%  
- Cognitive: 75%  

View Detailed Report →  


### ACTIVITY IDEAS (AI SUGGESTED)  
- Color Mixing Activity: Enhances creativity & observation skills. Age: 2.5 – 4 Years | Creative  
- Story & Role Play: Improves imagination & communication. Age: 2.5 – 4 Years | Language  
- Nature Walk: Builds curiosity & environment awareness. Age: 2.5 – 4 Years | Outdoor  

View All Ideas →  


### TEACHER BENEFITS  
- Save 5+ Hours Every Week  
- Reduce Manual Work by 70%  
- Stronger Parent Satisfaction  
- Better Student Outcomes  
- AI Assistance at Every Step  
- All-in-One Teaching Companion  


### SUPPORTED IN EVERY WAY  
- Offline Mode  
- Multi-language  
- Voice Notes  
- Quick Tutorials  
- Help & Support  


### END OF DAY FLOW  
- Complete Reports  
- Share with Parents  
- Sync All Data  
- Backup to Cloud  
- Relax, You Did Great!  


“PreOne makes teaching joyful and meaningful. I spend less time on paperwork and more time with my little stars.  
– Neha Teacher, Little Stars Preschool”  


PreOne  
Empowering Teachers. Enriching Childhoods.
